## 7. Design Constraints

| ID | Summary | Impl |
|----|---------|------|
| CR-001 | All source files shall reside under a src folder at the project root | — |
| CR-002 | The package shall provide a runnable module entry point at src/cpm_fm/__main__.py that invokes cpm_fm.app:main(), enabling… | app.py:main |
| CR-003 | All GUI-related source files shall reside in a gui folder within the source tree | — |
| CR-004 | All serial and terminal related source files shall reside in a terminal folder within the… | — |
| CR-005 | All other source files shall reside in a utils folder within the source tree | — |
| CR-006 | Non-Python assets (icons, images) shall be kept out of the Python source modules… | — |
| CR-007 | Source files shall be organised as cohesive modules, one module per logical component (serial management… | — |
| CR-008 | Source files shall be named in snake_case after the component they implement (e.g… | — |
| CR-009 | All Python source files shall adhere to the PEP 8 standard | — |
| CR-010 | The Copy to Remote and Copy to Host actions shall be guarded so that a… | app.py:do_copy_to_remote, do_copy_to_host |
| CR-011 | The following settings are persisted but their behaviour is deferred to a future release and… | survey of app.py |
| CR-012 | The graphical user interface shall be implemented with **PySide6 (Qt for Python)**… | — |
| CR-013 | The Material Design visual theme (UIR-070) shall be supplied by the qt-material package, declared as… | app.py:main, theme.py:apply_theme |
| CR-014 | The GUI, serial/terminal (terminal/), and configuration (utils/) layers shall remain decoupled such that the terminal/… | utils/i18n.py |
| CR-015 | Internationalisation (FR-121) shall translate only human-facing prose… | gui/config_dialogs.py (field label_key translated, option values not); FR-121 |

## 8. Non-Functional Requirements

| ID | Summary | Impl |
|----|---------|------|
| NFR-001 | The application shall remain responsive during serial reads and file transfers… | serial_manager.py:_read_loop, app.py transfer threads; v1.3 UI migration; tests test_serial_manager.py (read-loop dispatch & pause/resume) |
| NFR-002 | The application shall support both the flat and nested JSON configuration file shapes for serial… | serial_manager.py:open_port; tests test_serial_manager.py |
| NFR-003 | The X-Modem implementation shall, by default, transmit 128-byte packets framed with SOH (0x01)… | xmodem.py:send_file, receive_file, _abort, _drain_tx; tests test_xmodem.py (independent checksum/CRC/trailer vectors, NAK-exhaustion, EOF padding, 1K STX send, CRC-mode/STX-1K/split-read-1K/duplicate/corrupt-trailer/empty-transfer receive, cancel-abort flush, non-draining-TX no-hang) |
| NFR-004 | No Qt widget shall be created or mutated from any thread other than the Qt… | app.py:_connect_signals |
| NFR-005 | Adding support for a new language shall require only adding a lang_<language>.txt file (DR-042) to… | utils/i18n.py:available_languages, app.py:_setup_language_menu |
